title: Tick 12: seed evals pairs passing with 15 real outcome+report pairs sourced from merged enterprise PRs
question: Does evals pairs passing now contain 15 real outcome+report pairs each scoring at or above the canonical floor of 3.5 when run through the python HeuristicVerifier and is a MANIFEST md present that enumerates the pairs and lists the remaining 5 needed to hit the D1 target of 20?
success_criteria: evals pairs passing contains 30 files representing 15 outcome+report pairs
all 15 pairs score at least 3.5 against the python HeuristicVerifier verified via a one-shot loop
MANIFEST md enumerates the 15 pairs names the source PRs and lists candidate enterprise areas to source the remaining 5 pairs from
QUEUE row D1 is flipped to in_progress with the runroc path pointing at evals pairs passing and a note that 5 more pairs are needed

capabilities: 13 outcome+report pairs from opensubagents outcomes-mcp ticks 1 through 11 plus the two bootstrap pairs are copied into evals pairs passing
2 outcome+report pairs from opensubagents outcomes spec repo outcome-gate and mcp-server-submodule are copied into evals pairs passing under spec- prefixed names
all 15 pairs verified against the python HeuristicVerifier with zero failures
MANIFEST md present and identifies the missing 5 pair candidate sources
